description: Core Power Automate workflow action and trigger types observed in exported flow definitions. These are not connector operations and do not have /connectors/{slug}/ reference pages.

AppendToArrayVariable.description: Appends a value to an existing array variable.

AppendToStringVariable.description: Appends text to an existing string variable.

Compose.description: Evaluates an expression or value and exposes the result for later actions.

DecrementVariable.description: Decreases a numeric variable by a specified value.

Foreach.description: Runs nested actions once for each item in an array.

If.description: Runs one branch when an expression is true and an optional else branch when it is false.

IncrementVariable.description: Increases a numeric variable by a specified value.

InitializeVariable.description: Creates a variable and optionally assigns its initial value.

OpenApiConnection.description: Calls a connector operation identified by inputs.host.apiId and inputs.host.operationId.

OpenApiConnectionWebhook.description: Creates or waits on a connector webhook operation identified by inputs.host.apiId and inputs.host.operationId.

ParseJson.description: Parses JSON content against a schema so downstream actions can use typed tokens.

Scope.description: Groups actions so they can be organized and handled as a unit in run-after/error patterns.

SetVariable.description: Assigns a new value to an existing variable.

Switch.description: Runs one case branch based on the value of an expression, with an optional default branch.

Terminate.description: Stops a flow run with a configured status such as Succeeded, Failed, or Cancelled.

Until.description: Runs nested actions repeatedly until an expression becomes true or loop limits are reached.

Wait.description: Pauses the flow for a specified duration or until a specified timestamp.
